text.title: notion-pm Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for notion-pm as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Formula that uses prop("Tasks") to iterate task relations and check each task's status manually.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Formula iteration over relations is not supported in Notion formulas. Use a Rollup with a filter instead.
